versions.content: If a player deck empties, the player shuffles their discard pile to make a new deck and deals themself one facedown encounter card. If the encounter deck empties, the encounter discard pile is shuffled to make a new deck and one acceleration token is placed on the main scheme.
Encounter cards are dealt from the encounter deck. They represent the challenges the villain throws at the heroes, including minions, treacheries, attachments, side schemes, and obligations.
If a card is exhausted, it is rotated 90 degrees. An exhausted card cannot be exhausted again until it is readied. Most characters must exhaust to attack, thwart, defend, or recover.
